connectors.purpose: Primary source of truth — rubric claims should trace back to the Reddit quotes and Google Trends data here. A claim not in this file and without an external citation is a candidate for scrutiny.
Provides the scope and intent of each sub-genre's metrics — used to identify when a claim falls outside the intended scoring context or belongs in a different metric.
Defines the structural contract rubrics must conform to — used to identify structural issues alongside factual ones.
Keeps the audit aligned with the gamer-first methodology — helps identify when claims are editorial or assumption-driven rather than player-grounded.
